description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a red-tiled gable roof and an attached single-story outbuilding. The main structure features a mix of large and small windows, with a wooden front door and a small garden area at the entrance. The rear section includes a private courtyard with a wooden deck, greenery, and a mature tree providing shade. The outbuilding, also with a red-tiled roof, is connected to the main house by a covered walkway. The house has a partially open upper floor, revealing interior rooms and furnishings. The exterior is primarily composed of red and gray brick, with wooden and glass accents throughout.
description: A two-story brick house with a red-tiled gable roof, attached outbuilding, and a private courtyard with greenery and a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, small garden, and partial view of the upper floor interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the attached outbuilding, and the courtyard with a tree and wooden deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the outbuilding's gable roof, the covered walkway, and the back of the main house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing large glass doors, the courtyard, and the open upper floor layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with a small step, flanked by a garden and simple landscaping, no porch or overhang.
